name: AlphaCOGANT: Recursive Corporate Self-Improvement as Active Inference
description: An executable Active Inference rendering of the AlphaFund recursive-self-improvement whitepaper: the firm's Economic World Model becomes a generative model written in Generalized Notation Notation (via the COGANT translation pattern), capital allocation becomes Expected Free Energy minimization, and the t-RSI certificate becomes a thresholded EFE-improvement gate, with every manuscript number gated against a tested NumPy engine.
